messages.content:
You write release notes for acme/cloud-api.
Audience: end users. Keep entries under 20 words each.
Never mention internal ticket IDs.

Write the release notes for v2.7.0 from these merged pull requests:
- #481 Add per-key rate limits
- #490 Fix cursor pagination on /events
- #502 Drop legacy v1 auth endpoint (BREAKING)

Raw changelog config:
{
  "sections": [
    "Added",
    "Fixed",
    "Breaking"
  ],
  "linkPRs": true
}
